section.heading: Loans to Corporation from Reconstruction Finance Corporation authorized

content.p: The Reconstruction Finance Corporation is authorized to loan out of its funds not to exceed $75,000 for the use of the Corporation.

note.heading: Abolition of Reconstruction Finance Corporation
note.p: Section 6(a) of Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1957, eff. June 30, 1957, 22 F.R. 4633, 71 Stat. 647, set out as a note under section 601 of this title, abolished the Reconstruction Finance Corporation.
